title: bug verb + CI auto-replay
manager: `bug` produces a self-proving bug report — a redacted repro bundle plus a narrated trace, with CI auto-replay labels so the report re-runs itself in the pipeline. This is the endgame of replay plus redaction: a bug report that carries its own reproduction, redacted safely, and re-executes automatically, so "cannot reproduce" stops being a valid response and a fixed bug can be proven fixed.
cs: `bug` = redacted bundle (W9.10) + narrated trace + CI auto-replay labels; the self-reproducing bug report.
